moments.title: Royal Welsh Show
moments.blurb: The Royal Welsh Show runs 20–23 July 2026 at Llanelwedd, Builth Wells — the biggest agricultural show in Europe.

moments.title: National Eisteddfod of Wales
moments.blurb: The National Eisteddfod comes to North Pembrokeshire, 1–8 August 2026 — Wales' great celebration of language, music and culture.

moments.title: Sidmouth Folk Festival
moments.blurb: The 72nd Sidmouth Folk Festival takes over the Devon seaside town, 31 July–7 August 2026.
